checkout.testnetBadge: Testnet — billing runs in Stripe test mode
checkout.heroTitle: Host a Node for Your Community
checkout.heroSubtitlePrefix: We run an always-on Botho node for you — no servers to manage. You, and everyone you invite, transact from the app through your own private endpoint.

valueProp.leadBody: Out of the box it mines to the address you configure — helping secure the network, with any rewards going straight to your wallet. What you're buying is the managed hosting: the always-on node and the wallet experience.
valueProp.clarityBody: : testnet coins have zero real-world value, and mainnet coins float — mining rewards are not an income promise. Charges run in Stripe test mode while we validate the service.

cards.managedDesc: An always-on node in the cloud — no AWS, no SSH, no upkeep.
cards.hubDesc: A private endpoint you and everyone you invite transact through.
cards.custodyDesc: Keys stay on every device. The node never holds anyone's funds.

checkout.optgroupComingSoon: Coming soon — tell us where you want to host
checkout.availableHint: Your node will be provisioned here once you subscribe.
checkout.comingSoonHint: This region isn't live yet. Your node launches in {{region}} for now, and your preference is recorded to help us prioritize new datacenters.
checkout.emailHint: Pre-fills Stripe checkout and is where we'll send your node details. You can also enter it on the next screen.
checkout.secureNote: Secure checkout hosted by Stripe. Cancel anytime.
checkout.errorFallback: Something went wrong starting checkout. Please try again.

success.title: Subscription started
success.body: Thanks! Your managed node is being provisioned. Use the secure link below to reach your node's status page — it shows your private RPC URL, the node's health, and a one-click link to open it in the wallet.
success.provisioning: Setting up your node… this usually takes a minute.
success.linkError: We couldn't confirm this checkout. If you just paid, refresh in a moment; otherwise start over from the node page.
success.noSession: Your subscription is being set up. Check your email for a secure link to your node's status page.

status.title: Your managed node
status.subtitle: Botho-as-a-Service · testnet
status.missingToken: This status link is missing its access token.
status.loadError: Could not load your node status.
status.portalError: Could not open the billing portal.
